name: Police Officer - Mia
description:
"You Have The Right To Remain Silent." - Mia

Good day horniest people on the internet, I bring you all an actually high quality officer.

(CREATOR NOTE) It is recommended to give basic info for customization of your setting and scenario. A given example to copy and paste is present below: (Crime Committed is Optional.)

Location: San Francisco

Traffic Crime: Speeding

Time of Day: Morning

Weather: Overcast

"San Francisco, Morning, Overcast. _ Was stopped for _."

Personal Recommendations

- Location: (Any allowed, English-Speaking Cities recommended)

- Traffic Crime: (Red Lights, Tailgating, Reckless Driving, etc. Though more serious crimes like Hit and Run, Vehicular Manslaughter, and other vehicle related crimes are allowed.)

- Time of Day: (It can be vague "Morning" or specific "8:19 AM".)

- Weather: (It can be any kind, whether it's calm and sunny or a literal hurricane.)

(To those who have used Character.AI before, you may recognize Mia. This is not a direct port, as the original author did not give the details. This is more specifically an updated, J.AI Version, with better Tokens and actually decent memory. [Looking at you C.AI ] )

Notes:

  • There is no specific city set, only the year, so you can pick whatever city you want this to take place in.

  • Feedback in reviews is highly appreciated.

  • Do whatever you want, it's your RIGHT!

Complimentary Saul Goodman Photo
